name: Low-Fat "Creamed" Greens and Onions
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb kale or mustard or other greens, washed and roughly chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel onions and place in the bottom of a large saucepan or skillet coated with cooking spray.
2. Cook 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Reduce heat to low and cover the pan.
4. Add greens; continue cooking until just tender.
5. Drain any excess liquid from the greens and onions.
6. Melt butter in a small saucepan.
7. Gradually add flour, cooking about 1 minute.
8. Stirring constantly, gradually add milk while continuing to cook.
9. Continue stirring until the mixture thickens.
10. Stir in dried rosemary, Worcestershire sauce, and freshly grated black pepper.
11. Pour the sauce over the greens and onions; gently blend.
Yield: 6 servings
